'''on''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mouth|mouth]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ?-?-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mouth|mouth]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || ?æ?inith || ?æ?inij || ?æ?inish || ?æ?ini
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ?a?u?unuth || ?a?u?unuj || ?a?u?unush || ?a?u?unu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ?a?unuth || ?a?unuj || ?a?unush || ?a?unu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ?a?ufnufth || ?a?ufnufj || ?a?ufnufsh || ?a?ufnuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ?æ?eneth || ?æ?enej || ?æ?enesh || ?æ?ene
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ?a?o?onoth || ?a?o?onoj || ?a?o?onosh || ?a?o?ono
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ?a?onoth || ?a?onoj || ?a?onosh || ?a?ono
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ?a?ofnofth || ?a?ofnofj || ?a?ofnofsh || ?a?ofnof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ?æ?ïfnïfth || ?æ?ïfnïfj || ?æ?ïfnïfsh || ?æ?ïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ?a?ïf?ïfnïfth || ?a?ïf?ïfnïfj || ?a?ïf?ïfnïfsh || ?a?ïf?ïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ?a?ïfnïfth || ?a?ïfnïfj || ?a?ïfnïfsh || ?a?ïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ?a?ïffnïffth || ?a?ïffnïffj || ?a?ïffnïffsh || ?a?ïffnïff
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ?æ?ænæth || ?æ?ænæj || ?æ?ænæsh || ?æ?ænæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ?a?a?anath || ?a?a?anaj || ?a?a?anash || ?a?a?ana
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ?a?anath || ?a?anaj || ?a?anash || ?a?ana
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ?a?afnafth || ?a?afnafj || ?a?afnafsh || ?a?afnaf
|}

''64 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ?a?anatha || ?a?anaja || ?a?anasha || ?a?anaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || ?a?anath || ?a?anaj || ?a?anash || ?a?ana
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ?a?anathal || ?a?anajal || ?a?anashal || ?a?anakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ?a?anaathatha || ?a?anaajaja || ?a?anaashasha || ?a?anaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || ?a?anathan || ?a?anajan || ?a?anashan || ?a?anakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ?a?anathaoro || ?a?anajaoro || ?a?anashaoro || ?a?anakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Irregular words]]
[[Category:Words 66806d6]]
[[Category:words 8d63c8d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d34c0b6}}
